# {{ site.title }}

> {{ site.description }} Written by {{ site.author.name }} — {{ site.subtitle }} — from {{ site.author.location }}. Topics include engineering leadership, software architecture, education, AI in the workplace, and personal essays.

This file follows the [llms.txt](https://llmstxt.org/) convention to help language models and other automated readers find the most useful starting points on the site.

## Site

- [About]({{ '/about/' | absolute_url }}): Background on the author — a Principal Software Engineer at SmartSense by Digi with 25+ years of experience, and an adjunct instructor at Southern New Hampshire University.
- [Follow]({{ '/follow/' | absolute_url }}): Where to find {{ site.author.name }} on the social web.
- [Disclaimer]({{ '/disclaimer/' | absolute_url }}): Editorial scope and limitations — views are personal, not those of any employer or institution.

{%- endfor %}
